relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file provides customer segment definitions and metrics that logically feed into marketing offer creation; the outbound file contains offer scripts targeted at those segments. The pipeline (accounts → marketing → customer_services) is coherent, and segment data from inbound directly informs offer targeting in outbound.

mappings.reasoning: No identifier field in inbound; likely system-generated by marketing system.
No offer name or promotion title exists in inbound segment data.
Hardcoded enum value 'Marketing'; not derived from inbound data.
Hardcoded enum value 'Customer Services'; not derived from inbound data.

No effective date in inbound; determined by marketing campaign planning, not segment data.

No channel or delivery medium specified in inbound segment data.

No script content in inbound; created by marketing copywriters based on segment characteristics.

No success metrics defined in inbound segment data; determined by marketing campaign objectives.
Count of outbound scripts; not derivable from inbound segment counts.
Timestamp of outbound collection modification; independent of inbound message timestamp.
Schema version identifier; not derived from inbound data.
